evals.prompt: Create a kanban board UI for tracking tasks with columns: To Do, In Progress, Done. Include 2-3 sample task cards in each column with title, assignee, and due date. Use the job tracker black/white minimalist style.
evals.expected_output: HTML/CSS with black background, white text, JetBrains Mono font, 7-column grid layout (or adapted), kanban cards with proper styling, uppercase labels

evals.prompt: Build a job application form with fields for: position title, company name, application date, salary range, job URL, and notes textarea. Style it like the job tracker form with the minimalist black/white aesthetic.
evals.expected_output: HTML form with proper form-field structure, uppercase labels in muted color, transparent inputs with border, submit button with inverted colors

evals.prompt: Design an analytics dashboard showing: total count, conversion rate, and two bar charts (one horizontal, one vertical) for data visualization. Use the job tracker's monochrome chart styling.
evals.expected_output: Stats section with stat-value and stat-label classes, Chart.js integration with dark theme config, 2-column grid for charts

evals.prompt: Create a login page with social login buttons (Google, GitHub) and a traditional email/password form. Match the job tracker's login page styling exactly.
evals.expected_output: login-container with centered layout, social-btn class for OAuth buttons, form-field structure for inputs, inverted button styling
